qa_pairs.question: How can I obtain support or more information about the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Globus service?
qa_pairs.answer: To get support or more information regarding the Digital Research Alliance of Canada's Globus service, you should send an email to globus@tech.alliancecan.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What specific information should I include in an email when contacting globus@tech.alliancecan.ca for support?
qa_pairs.answer: When contacting globus@tech.alliancecan.ca for support, you should provide your name, Compute Canada Role Identifier (CCRI), institution, and a detailed description of your inquiry or issue, making sure to indicate the sites you want to transfer data to and from.
